args.query: SELECT oli.Id, oli.OpportunityId, oli.Quantity, oli.TotalPrice, p.Name AS ProductName FROM OpportunityLineItem oli LEFT JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON trim(leading '#' FROM p.Id)=trim(leading '#' FROM oli.Product2Id) WHERE trim(leading '#' FROM oli.OpportunityId)='006Wt000007BGGjIAO';

exec_args.sql: SELECT oli.Id, oli.OpportunityId, oli.Quantity, oli.TotalPrice, p.Name AS ProductName FROM OpportunityLineItem oli LEFT JOIN products_orders.Product2 p ON trim(leading '#' FROM p.Id)=trim(leading '#' FROM oli.Product2Id) WHERE trim(leading '#' FROM oli.OpportunityId)='006Wt000007BGGjIAO';
